Unleash your creativity with Mixcoco Soak-Off Carved Gel, the ideal solution for 4D nail art designs. Its thick, moldable texture allows you to create stunning sculpted effects with precision.

💎 Features & Benefits:

  • ✅ Flexible & Sculptable: Perfect for detailed 4D nail art designs.
  • ✅ Soak-Off Formula: Easy to remove without damaging the nails.
  • ✅ Long-Lasting Wear: Ensures durable and flawless designs.
  • ✅ High-Quality Pigmentation: Provides a smooth and professional finish.
  • ✅ Compatible with UV & LED Lamps: Cures quickly for efficient application.

📦 Capacity: 15ml

💅 Perfect for professional and DIY nail art lovers! Get yours now!
